free_text: (d, alpha) reactions on C12 and O16 with deuterons in
the energy range from 15 MeV to 20 MeV
Main reference. See also TITLE and AUTHOR.
- Solid angle of detector is about 1 msr.
- p-n junction type solid state radiation detector
